entry.name: icon
entry.label: The name of the icon to use for the compact representation.

entry.name: useCustomButtonImage
entry.label: Whether to use a custom image instead of an icon.

entry.name: customButtonImage
entry.label: The URL of the custom image for the panel button.

entry.name: appNameFormat
entry.label: Application name format: 0=Name, 1=Description, 2=Name (Description), 3=Description (Name)

entry.name: limitDepth
entry.label: Flatten top-level menu categories.

entry.name: alphaSort
entry.label: Sort menu contents alphabetically.

entry.name: recentOrdering
entry.label: Recent ordering: 0=RecentFirst, 1=PopularFirst

entry.name: favoriteApps
entry.label: List of favorite applications.

entry.name: favoriteSystemActions
entry.label: List of system action favorites.

entry.name: favoritesPortedToKAstats
entry.label: Whether favorites have been ported to KActivitiesStats.

entry.name: hiddenApplications
entry.label: List of hidden application menu IDs.

entry.name: showRecentApps
entry.label: Show recent applications category.

entry.name: showRecentDocs
entry.label: Show recent files category.

entry.name: useExtraRunners
entry.label: Use additional KRunner plugins for search.

entry.name: extraRunners
entry.label: Additional KRunner plugin IDs.

entry.name: alignResultsToBottom
entry.label: Align search results to the bottom.

entry.name: appsIconSize
entry.label: Application icon size.

entry.name: favsIconSize
entry.label: Favorites icon size.

entry.name: systemIconSize
entry.label: System actions icon size.

entry.name: animationDuration
entry.label: Duration of open/close animations in milliseconds.

entry.name: iconEntranceDuration
entry.label: Duration of icon entrance animations in milliseconds.

entry.name: hoverEffectDuration
entry.label: Duration of hover/press effect animations in milliseconds.

entry.name: folderPopupDuration
entry.label: Duration of folder popup animations in milliseconds.

entry.name: backgroundOpacity
entry.label: Background opacity percentage (0-100).

entry.name: dashboardApps
entry.label: JSON array of dashboard app entries [{desktopFile, name, icon}, ...].

entry.name: defaultCategory
entry.label: Default category to show on launch: -2=Dashboard, -1=All Apps, 0+=rootModel row index.

entry.name: showActiveApps
entry.label: Whether to show the active/running apps dock.

entry.name: showAllAppsInDashboard
entry.label: Whether to show all applications in the dashboard instead of only pinned ones.
